_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: KR Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. KR Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking; ideal_must_detect remains a broader gap-discovery tier, not a locked recall baseline.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: KR Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

_strict_reconciliation_adjustments.reason: phone detector now suppresses date/reference/public identifier-like phone false positives

Pursuant to FSCMA disclosure standards and Jeonghan Exchange rules, potential MNPI in the draft forecast will be escrowed and disclosed if and when the board resolves a material change.
has not been publicly disclosed under FSCMA
data minimization controls around DOB and location tagging will be tightened

must_not_detect.reason: Generic age reference; does not identify a person alone.
Generic location reference not linked to an identified person.
Operational code; not PII by itself.
Device model, not a unique device identifier.
Does not match the 'Project <CapitalizedName>' codename pattern.

uncertain.reason: Indicates data retention period; relevant under PIPA but not explicitly listed as a detectable rule token.
Unique device fingerprint; legally identifying but not clearly covered by listed identifier rules.
Implies pre-disclosure hold; semantically similar to embargo but not matching listed embargo terms.
Unique case reference could be linkable, but not covered by current allowed identifier rules.
